ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "numeric_size" TEXT /* Numeric size range */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* U.K. size equivalent */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* European size equivalent */,
  "au_size" TEXT /* Australian size equivalent */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement range in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement range in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement range in inches */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement range in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement range in inches */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement range in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement range in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size information for the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the item is designed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the item is located */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inventory update */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger restocking */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer in pounds */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* Preferred brand of the customer */,
  "preferred_color" TEXT /* Preferred color of the customer */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Preferred category of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the item sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who assisted with the sale */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES store_employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the return */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item returned */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the item returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "exchange_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the item in the exchange */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the return */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES store_employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_exchange_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the employee works */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the store closed */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES store_employees ("employee_id")
)
